translated: [CORNER: Card Illustrations] I'd like to talk about the card illustrations while we actually look at them.
I'm appearing on the monitor right now, right? On everyone's screen?
Yeah, I'll believe that's the case.
First, let's start with Mizuki.
Here is the pre-training version.
I absolutely love this illustration.
First of all, seeing the older sister smiling so happily at Mizuki reminds me so much of Yuki-san,
who gave Mizuki a ribbon when they were little during the New Year's event.
And Mizuki's expression here, showing her how it looks, is just incredible.
It's hard to believe this is just the pre-training art.
Seriously.
I love the atmosphere of this space.
Oh, and look.
The person in the background there is Akito.
Yep.
With that said, let's look at the post-training version too.
Here it is.
So good.
Butterflies and ribbons have become very symbolic for Mizuki, but in my mind, those illustrations usually involve...
scissors.
I usually have an image of them holding scissors, but this time they aren't. It's such a bright space,
and even though their mouth is covered, you just know they're smiling. That expression is so precious.
My kid is such a good kid, honestly.
Next up is Ena-chan.
I'm so happy Yuki-san is in this one too.
In this scene,
they're meeting the older sister for the first time,
and Ena is getting a bit overwhelmed by her pushy personality.
I love seeing Ena like that.
It's so good.
If you haven't seen the event story yet,
please go check it out in the game.
Seeing the older sister
interacting with all of Niigo is a must-see.
Next... isn't this Ena amazing?
I think girls with their hair tucked behind their ears are great, so this illustration...
it's incredibly good.
I thought she was a florist for a second.
Wonderful, Ena-chan.
So cute.
The way her eyes are slightly downcast is nice too.
Ena is just so cute.
Next is Kanade-kun.
How cute! Seeing her eating
the souvenirs from the older sister
is just adorable.
She's really cute.
What is this level of cuteness?
Even if that were a protein bar, she'd still be cute.
I just want her to be eating something forever.
Thank you.
